title: How would students studying psychology respond to NGE
display_title: How would students studying psychology respond to NGE
wikitext:
[]: How would students studying psychology respond to NGE?             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Wed May 28, 2014 9:47 pm I've always wondered if this was done. Each class they show an episode of Eva. Combining the necessary ones like 25 and 26. And then they see EOE. How would students react to seeing this series?

[]:             Quote Post by Lorkhan » Wed May 28, 2014 9:50 pm "Never choose a major because you really liked an anime on the subject." EDIT: Welp, I completely misread the point of this thread. Ah well, point still sands.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Wed May 28, 2014 9:52 pm Well, I meant if anyone was taking a psych class. Let's assume they've never seen Eva before.

[]:             Quote Post by Lorkhan » Wed May 28, 2014 9:55 pm Truth be told, I couldn't really say how they would react because I'm not them, and I honestly can't fathom a classroom showing it in the first place. I wouldn't be shocked if it actually happened, but its something I really couldn't begin to guess at.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Wed May 28, 2014 9:59 pm Lorkhan wrote: Truth be told, I couldn't really say how they would react because I'm not them, and I honestly can't fathom a classroom showing it in the first place. I wouldn't be shocked if it actually happened, but its something I really couldn't begin to guess at.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed May 28, 2014 10:13 pm Personally I assume they would be both interested and horrified, and they would have more to discuss about the mindset of the writer rather than the characters. They would also say there is something wrong with KxS shippers cause SxA is totally the OTP. ;D I'm a sneaky devil.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Wed May 28, 2014 10:59 pm Mean girl: I'm Asuka, what are you stupid?! That cute shy guy: I musn't run away. Why are they playing my life story? Cute shy goth girl whose seen it and has blue hair: ... Teacher's pet: pay attention! There might be a test! Nerd: cool! Giant robots! Jock: might as well beat up that transfer student. Gay guy: why did they behead me if I'm an angel? Teacher: sits at desk doing the Gendo pose.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu May 29, 2014 7:19 am I showed a friend of mine, who has a major in psychology and is on the way to make her degree in clinical psychology (which she needs to diagnose people, from what I gathered). Well, she didn't say anything we haven't already gathered. She said, they definitely would need psychological help, even without their issues, since they are put under extremely traumatic stressful events all the time. And that they were textbook-examples of certain disorders, but as a professional she mustn't diagnose without interacting with them professionally. Also, they are anime-characters But from what I gathered, Brickhaus is a psychiatrist? So perhaps try searching the forum for his posts, since he rarely posts anything.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Thu May 29, 2014 2:07 pm I'd definitely prefer watching Evangelion over Sybil any day of the week.
